description_long: This is a handheld electric drill with a robust, ergonomic design, featuring a yellow and black color scheme commonly associated with power tools. The main body is cylindrical and houses the motor, with a pistol-grip handle below that includes a visible trigger button for operation. The front section has a black chuck holding a metallic twist drill bit, extending forward for drilling tasks. The base of the handle appears to contain a detachable battery pack, providing cordless operation. The surface is mostly hard plastic with some rubberized areas for grip, and the drill bit is metallic. No visible brand logo or power cord is present, and there are no apparent ventilation slots on the body.
description: A yellow and black cordless electric drill with a pistol grip, visible trigger, and a twist drill bit attached. The design features a detachable battery pack and ergonomic rubberized grip.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular end of the drill bit and the symmetrical alignment of the handle and battery pack.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the drill, the twist bit, the ergonomic handle, trigger button, and battery pack.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the rounded back of the drill body and the battery pack at the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the drill's profile, including the bit, handle, and battery pack.
